allow: PowerShell(Write-Output "=== quando key_base64 foi adicionada \(git\) ==="; git log --diff-filter=A --format="%h %ai %an | %s" -- "frontend/public/inter/key_base64.txt"; Write-Output ""; Write-Output "=== ultimos commits que mexeram em public/inter ==="; git log --oneline -5 -- "frontend/public/inter/"; Write-Output ""; Write-Output "=== .gitignore \(inter/pem/cert/key\) ==="; Select-String -Path "frontend/.gitignore",".gitignore" -Pattern "inter|\\.pem|cert|key_base64|public/inter" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { $_.Path + ":" + $_.LineNumber + ": " + $_.Line })

PowerShell(Write-Output "=== Conteudo de public/inter antes ==="; Get-ChildItem "frontend/public/inter" | Select-Object Name, Length; Write-Output ""; Write-Output "=== Testando exposicao publica \(HTTP\) ==="; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://zykor.com.br/inter/key_base64.txt" -Method Head -TimeoutSec 15 -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Output \("key_base64.txt -> HTTP " + $r.StatusCode + " \(EXPOSTO!\)"\) } catch { Write-Output \("key_base64.txt -> " + $_.Exception.Message\) }; try { $r2 = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://zykor.com.br/service-credentials/credentials.json" -Method Head -TimeoutSec 15 -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Output \("service-credentials -> HTTP " + $r2.StatusCode\) } catch { Write-Output \("service-credentials path publico \(esse e via Supabase Storage, nao Vercel\)"\) })

PowerShell(cd C:\\Projects\\zykor\\frontend; if \(Test-Path package.json\) { $pkg = Get-Content package.json -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json; if \($pkg.scripts.'type-check'\) { Write-Output "rodando: npm run type-check"; npm run type-check 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 40 } else { Write-Output "sem script type-check; rodando npx tsc --noEmit"; npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 40 } })

PowerShell(Write-Output "=== branch atual ==="; git branch --show-current; Write-Output "=== status \(resumido\) ==="; git status --short | Select-Object -First 60; Write-Output "=== vercel CLI? ==="; try { $v = \(vercel --version\) 2>$null; Write-Output "vercel: $v" } catch { Write-Output "vercel CLI nao encontrado no PATH" }; Write-Output "=== .vercel link? ==="; if \(Test-Path "frontend/.vercel/project.json"\) { Get-Content "frontend/.vercel/project.json" } elseif \(Test-Path ".vercel/project.json"\) { Get-Content ".vercel/project.json" } else { Write-Output "sem .vercel/project.json" })

PowerShell($anon = "eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJpc3MiOiJzdXBhYmFzZSIsInJlZiI6InVxdGdzdnVqd2NieW1qbXZramh5Iiwicm9sZSI6ImFub24iLCJpYXQiOjE3NTEzMTExNjYsImV4cCI6MjA2Njg4NzE2Nn0.59x53jDOpNe9yVevnP-TcXr6Dkj0QjU8elJb636xV6M"; $body = '{"bar_id":3,"sync_mode":"daily_incremental"}'; try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://uqtgsvujwcbymjmvkjhy.supabase.co/functions/v1/contaazul-sync" -Method Post -Headers @{ Authorization = "Bearer $anon" } -ContentType "application/json" -Body $body -TimeoutSec 280; $r | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 6 } catch { Write-Output \("ERRO: " + $_.Exception.Message\); if \($_.ErrorDetails\) { $_.ErrorDetails.Message } })

PowerShell($f = "C:\\Users\\rodri\\.claude\\projects\\C--Projects-zykor\\d694c3ed-909e-47ff-924e-25e962937dc1\\tool-results\\mcp-claude_ai_Supabase-get_edge_function-1780338006785.txt"; $c = Get-Content $f -Raw; $i = $c.IndexOf\("Sincronizando dados auxiliares"\); if \($i -ge 0\) { Write-Output "--- trecho do gating de auxiliares ---"; Write-Output $c.Substring\([Math]::Max\(0,$i-260\), 620\) })
